text:
Sure. Here's a short story.

There's an old oak tree in the middle of town. Every year it starts growing new leaves. It never stops. People love its leaves. They're famous. People take pictures. They don't cut them down; that would be criminal.

It always falls asleep before midnight. If you go there after dark, it's dark just like the rest of the town. But it talks all night long.

The longest conversation it ever had was with a cat. It never understood the cat.

I think there's probably a spirit there. That's where the leaves go. Sometimes people hear things. Sometimes they just fall late.

They should put it on tour.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
